33. PCA(2) Definition for Machine Learning

10 January 2021 - less than 1 min read time
Tags: Fast Campus ML

Source: Fast Campus, Dewy-World

PCA (Principal Components Analysis)

  • While reducing the dimension, make the information loss as small as possible
  • Create the new axis, that describes the data well.

  • Principal Components = PC = PC score
    • The coordinates from the new axis
    • The orthogonal projection from the new axis

with by Mark Joonho Lee
